ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who created the experiment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the experiment */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the experiment was last updated */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the experiment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the experiment was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the model belongs to */,
  "arch" TEXT /* Model architecture (e.g., resnet152) */,
  "bench_type" TEXT /* Benchmark type (e.g., quality) */,
  "hyperparameters" TEXT /* JSON string containing the hyperparameters used for the model */,
  "training_data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the training data configuration used for the model */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the model was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the model was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_bench_type FOREIGN KEY ("bench_type") REFERENCES benchmarks ("benchmark_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_training_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("training_data_id") REFERENCES training_data ("training_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_arch FOREIGN KEY ("arch") REFERENCES architectures ("arch_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "runs" (
  "run_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model run */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the run belongs to */,
  "run" INTEGER /* Run number */,
  "skip_n" INTEGER /* Number of skipped iterations */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Date and time when the run started */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* Date and time when the run ended */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the run */,
  "run_config" TEXT /* JSON string containing the configuration for the run */,
  "run_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who initiated the run */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("run_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_runs_run_by FOREIGN KEY ("run_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_runs_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "run_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model run the result belongs to */,
  "pol" TEXT /* Policy used (e.g., drop-norm-n) */,
  "prec" REAL /* Precision */,
  "rec" REAL /* Recall */,
  "acc" REAL /* Accuracy */,
  "f1" REAL /* F1 score */,
  "time" REAL /* Time taken */,
  "loss" REAL /* Loss value of the model during the run */,
  "learning_rate" REAL /* Learning rate used during the run */,
  "batch_size" INTEGER /* Batch size used during the training */,
  "epochs" INTEGER /* Number of epochs the model was trained for */,
  "validation_metrics" TEXT /* JSON string containing validation metrics */,
  "test_metrics" TEXT /* JSON string containing test metrics */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the results were recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("run_id") REFERENCES runs ("run_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "architectures" (
  "arch_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each architecture */,
  "arch_name" TEXT /* Name of the architecture (e.g., resnet152) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the architecture */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the architecture was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the architecture was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the architecture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("arch_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_architectures_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "benchmarks" (
  "benchmark_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each benchmark */,
  "benchmark_name" TEXT /* Name of the benchmark (e.g., quality) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the benchmark */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the benchmark was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the benchmark was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the benchmark */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("benchmark_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_benchmarks_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time when the user last logged in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_data" (
  "training_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training data configuration */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the training data configuration */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the training data configuration */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the training data configuration was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the training data configuration was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the training data configuration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("training_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_data_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
